content:
- [feedback_use_bun.md](feedback_use_bun.md) — Always use bun/bunx instead of npm/npx
- [project_mcp_servers.md](project_mcp_servers.md) — MCP servers configured for the project
- [gitlab_mcp_server.md](gitlab_mcp_server.md) — Standalone GitLab MCP server path, wiring, and PAT storage model
- [trello_env_location.md](trello_env_location.md) — Trello API credentials are stored in repo .env
- [desktop_ui_patterns.md](desktop_ui_patterns.md) — Desktop layout, navigation, settings, empty states, and

- **Active layout**: `Layout.tsx` — used by ALL routes via `__root.tsx`
- `IdeShell.tsx` was deleted (dead code, never mounted)
- `CommandPalette` (Cmd+K), `KeyboardShortcuts` (Cmd+/), `SearchHistoryOverlay` (Ctrl+R) are wired into `Layout.tsx`

- `LayoutNav.tsx`: PRIMARY_TABS (Overview, Chat, Agents) + `.nav-sep` + SECONDARY_TABS (Skills, Kanban, Memory, Vault, Settings) + `MoreMenu` overflow (IDE, Collab, Servers, Pipelines, Logs, Marketplace)
- CSS: `.nav-tab`, `.nav-tab--secondary`, `.nav-sep` in `shell.css`

- 7 sections: general, connections, budget, privacy, account, update, wizard
- `ConnectionsPanel.tsx` hub hosts 6 sub-tabs (infra, agent-runner, telegram, remote, mcp, voice)
- `SettingsSectionId` union in `settings-sections.ts`

- Shared `EmptyState` component in `shared/ui/EmptyState.tsx`
- Base CSS in `base.css` (`.empty-state`, `.empty-state-icon`, `.empty-state-title`, `.empty-state-desc`, `.empty-state-actions`)
- Used in: ActivityTimeline, MemoryGraphView, AgentDefinitionsGrid, KanbanColumn

- Grouped by date using `groupConversations()` helper
- Each item: 2-row layout — title+time row, preview row
- CSS classes: `.conversation-item-title-row`, `.conversation-item-time`, `.conversation-item-preview`, `.conversation-group-label`

name: Use bun not npm/npx
description: Always use bun instead of npm/npx for package management and running scripts
type: feedback
---

Always use `bun` and `bunx` instead of `npm`/`npx` for installing packages, running scripts, and executing CLI tools.

**Why:** The project uses bun as its package manager (bun@1.3.10). Using npm/npx is inconsistent and slower.

**How to apply:** Replace all `npm install` with `bun add`, all `npx` with `bunx`, all `npm run` with `bun run`.

- Standalone GitLab MCP server lives at `/Users/daniilschovkunov/gitlab-mcp-server`.
- Entry point: `/Users/daniilschovkunov/gitlab-mcp-server/index.ts`.
- It is modeled after the standalone `trello-mcp-server` pattern: Bun + single-file MCP server + compact text responses.
- GitLab PATs are intended to be stored in local config at `~/.config/gitlab-mcp-server/config.json`, not in `.mcp.json`.
- Project MCP wiring was added to `/Users/daniilschovkunov/agents-machine/.mcp.json` under server name

name: MCP servers configuration
description: Which MCP servers are configured and their status
type: project
---

**Problem:** `.mcp.json` failed to parse - `context7` schema violation
**Solution:** Removed built-in plugins (`playwright`, `context7`) from `.mcp.json`

### Built-in Plugins (Always Available)
1. **plugin:playwright:playwright** — browser automation
2. **plugin:context7:context7** — library documentation

### From ~/.claude.json (1 server)
3. **claude-context** — semantic code search
   - Status: ✅ Connected
   - Command: `/Users/daniilschovkunov/.local/bin/claude-context-wrapper.sh`
   - Indexed: 1239 files, 14241 chunks (AST splitter)
   - Usage: `mcp__claude-context__search_code()` for natural language search
   - Re-index after major changes

**To activate .mcp.json servers:**
1. Restart Claude Code, OR
2. Run `/mcp` → select each server → "Reconnect"

After activation, servers will appear as:
- `mcp__git__<tool-name>`
- `mcp__eslint__<tool-name>`
- `mcp__trello__<tool-name>`
- `mcp__sequential-thinking__<tool-name>`
- `mcp__memory__<tool-name>`

- ✅ **hookify** — custom hooks for preventing unwanted behaviors
  - Rule: dangerous-commands (blocks rm -rf /, dd, mkfs, format)

- **claude-context**: Semantic search by meaning (demonstrated with 6+ queries)
- **Git MCP**: 28 structured Git operations vs manual commands
- **ESLint MCP**: Real-time linting feedback
- **Trello MCP**: 24 tools for complete board management
- **hookify**: Enforces project standards automatically

- Trello API credentials for this repo are stored in the repository `.env` file.
- Relevant vars: `TRELLO_API_KEY`, `TRELLO_TOKEN`, `TRELLO_BOARD_ID`.
- When running terminal `curl` calls to Trello, load these env vars first (e.g. `set -a; source .env; set +a`).
ISP Platform monorepo. NestJS v11 microservices + Next.js 16 frontend. Multi-tenant (providerId mandatory everywhere).

- Services: `apps/services/{customer-core|product-catalog|billing|notification|oms|network-inventory}/`
- Frontend: `apps/web/src/`
- Proto types: `packages/contracts/gen/ts/{domain}/v1/*_pb.ts`
- Shared backend: `packages/nestjs-common/`
- K8s migrations: `infra/k8s/components/migrations/migrations/{service}/`
Located in `.claude/skills/`. Invoke when user types `/skill-name`.

### Drizzle chaining — SILENT BUG
`.where(a).where(b)` — second replaces first. ALWAYS `.where(and(a, b))`.
Also in `paginateQuery` — pass `baseConditions` param, not pre-built query.

### Multi-tenant leak
Every SQL needs `eq(table.providerId, providerId)`. Use cases need `providerId: string` (required). Post-fetch: `entity.providerId !== providerId → NotFoundError`.

### Frontend FSD
- page.tsx max 50 lines, ZERO inline components/functions
- Every component = separate file (entities/ui/ or wi

| Function | Location |
|----------|----------|
| `fmtCurrencyRaw(minorUnits)` | `@/shared/lib/format` |
| `fmtIsoDateTime(iso)` | `@/shared/lib/format` |
| `todayISO()` | `@/shared/lib/format` |
| `truncId(id)` | `@/shared/lib/format` |
| `addDays`, `getMonday`, `getWeekDates` | `@/shared/lib` |
| `EntityListCard` | `@/shared/ui` |
| `SearchWithHotkey` | `@/shared/ui` |
| `StatusFilter` | `@/shared/ui` |
| `PageHeader` | `@/shared/ui` |
| `TablePagination` | `@/shared/ui` |

- **BullMQ for background jobs**: RabbitMQ consumers → write to BullMQ queue → processors handle with built-in retry. Redis-backed.
- **One DB per service**: No shared PostgreSQL connections.
- **ConnectRPC**: Frontend ↔ Backend. RabbitMQ: async service-to-service.
- **Bun dev, Node prod**: Bun 1.2+ in dev, Node.js in Docker.
- **`oven/bun:1.3.9-alpine`**: Pinned. 1.3.10 breaks NestJS decorators.

| What | Convention | Example |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Files | `kebab-case.ts` | `create-order.use-case.ts` |
| Classes | `PascalCase` | `CreateOrderUseCase` |
| Functions/vars | `camelCase` | `findByUserId` |
| Constants/DI | `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` | `BILLING_TOKENS` |
| RabbitMQ exchanges | `dot.separated` | `isp.events.billing` |
File unknown was edited 10 times this session — likely a hot path worth monitoring.
